description: These slip on ballerina flats from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the bow in the front and the patent leather. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses and jeans.UpperPatent leather uppers for comfort and styleFabric bow tie on the frontSoft leather lining for added comfortSynthetic footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
